name: Djinn TypeScript / JavaScript
description: Node.js (via nvm) + typescript-language-server + scip-typescript + the user's chosen package manager.

node_version.description: Node.js version passed to `nvm install`. Node 24 is the active LTS as of 2026. Accepts anything nvm understands: `24`, `24.5.0`, `lts/jod`, `lts/*`.

pm.description: Package manager. One of: pnpm | yarn | bun | deno | npm. Installed via corepack or the PM's own installer.
